title: Department Manager Vacancy at DMart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at DMart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!
